title: T-014 — API: TO CRUD + numbering + state transitions
prompt:
Implement TO CRUD per PRD §7. Endpoints under `/api/planning/transfer-orders/`. Numbering reuses pattern from T-009 (`generateToNumber`). Server Actions: createTransferOrder, updateTransferOrder, deleteTransferOrder (allowed only in draft). State transitions delegate to to_state_machine_v1 (T-007). V-PLAN-TO-001/002 enforced (from!=to, same site). V-PLAN-TO-003 blocks ship without lines.

RED test covers: from/to same warehouse → 400, draft delete OK, planned delete blocked, ship without lines blocked.

pipeline_inputs.description: TO CRUD endpoints + state transitions backed by to_state_machine_v1.
pipeline_inputs.details: Schema validates from_warehouse !== to_warehouse + same site_id (V-PLAN-TO-002). Site comparison uses warehouses.site_id from 02-SETTINGS §12. Numbering format 'TO-YYYY-NNNNN'. Delete: only draft status; planned/shipped use cancel transition.
acceptance_criteria: Given from_warehouse_id == to_warehouse_id, when createTransferOrder runs, then HTTP 400 with code 'V-PLAN-TO-001'.
Given two warehouses on different sites, when createTransferOrder runs, then HTTP 400 with code 'V-PLAN-TO-002'.
Given a TO in 'planned' state, when DELETE called, then HTTP 409 (must use cancel transition); 'draft' state DELETE succeeds.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/actions/planning/__tests__/to-crud.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for V-PLAN-TO-001/002, draft-only delete, numbering issuance.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow cross-site TOs at this layer — M14 boundary.
Do not implement state transitions outside the rule engine.
